hooks.command: cd /Users/qnc/Projects/quantumcube 2>/dev/null; if git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE 'docs/app.html|docs/sw.js'; then SW=$(grep -oE 'qc-v[0-9]+' docs/sw.js 2>/dev/null | head -1); APP=$(grep -oE 'quantum-cube@qc-v[0-9]+' docs/app.html 2>/dev/null | head -1 | sed 's/quantum-cube@//'); [ "$SW" != "$APP" ] && echo "⚠️  VERSION MISMATCH: SW=$SW APP=$APP — bump qc-vNNN before committing" || true; fi
